active_directory_configuration.description: Details about the Active Directory configuration for the storage virtual machine, including NetBIOS name and self-managed Active Directory settings.

arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) that uniquely identifies the storage virtual machine.

creation_time.description: The date and time when the storage virtual machine was created.

endpoints.description: The network endpoints for accessing the storage virtual machine via different protocols like iSCSI, NFS, SMB, and management interfaces.

file_system_id.description: The ID of the file system associated with the storage virtual machine.

id.description: The unique identifier for the storage virtual machine.

lifecycle_status.description: The current status of the storage virtual machine, indicating its state in the lifecycle.

lifecycle_transition_reason.description: The reason for the last lifecycle status transition of the storage virtual machine.

name.description: The name assigned to the storage virtual machine.

subtype.description: The subtype of the storage virtual machine, defining its specific characteristics or configuration.

tags.description: A map of tags assigned to the storage virtual machine, used for organization and management.

uuid.description: The universally unique identifier (UUID) for the storage virtual machine.
